payment_methods.label: DHL MyBill self-serve portal
payment_methods.details: Customer logs in at mybill.dhl.com with their registered email and password, picks the invoice, and pays online. This is the primary self-serve channel and the same portal where invoice copies can be downloaded.

payment_methods.label: Virtual Account Number (bank transfer)
payment_methods.details: Each DHL customer has a unique Virtual Account Number tied to their DHL account. Transfer the exact invoice amount to that VAN via NEFT or RTGS — DHL's bank auto-reconciles the payment to this account number. The VAN can be shared by the collections desk if the customer does not have it.

collection_notes: Outbound collections scenario for DHL Express India POC.
